name: Ali Siddiq
bio: Ali Siddiq is an American stand-up comedian and storyteller from Houston, Texas, known for long-form narrative comedy drawn from his life, including six years he spent in prison. He won Comedy Centrals inaugural Up Next competition in 2013 and broke through with his viral This Is Not Happening story Mexicans Got on Boots. He has built a large following through his self-released YouTube specials, including the multi-part series The Domino Effect.

timeline.ev: Self-releases debut album Talking Loud Saying Something
Wins Comedy Centrals inaugural Up Next competition
Mexicans Got on Boots on This Is Not Happening goes viral
Hour special Its Bigger Than These Bars airs on Comedy Central
Releases The Domino Effect on YouTube
Completes the four-part Domino Effect series

accolades: Winner of Comedy Centrals inaugural Up Next competition in 2013
Finalist on NBCs Bring the Funny in 2019
My Two Sons won the NAACP Image Award for Outstanding Variety, the first independently produced stand-up special to do so

specials.t: Ali Siddiq: Its Bigger Than These Bars
